dj_text: And that was Dø I Norden. Hold on — Viking I Blodet is up! Just two left. The queue is almost spent.
commercial_text: This break was supposed to be an ad but we forgot to sell one. So here's 10 seconds of me making mouth noises. mmm.
hijack_text: Welcome to Corporate Radio MAX from Kosmos Sigma-9.
recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
title: Viking I Blodet
